Tomato_Bacterial_spot.label: Bacterial spot
Tomato_Bacterial_spot.description: Small dark brown to black water-soaked spots on leaves, stems, and fruit that may merge and cause leaf drop.
actions: Do not handle plants when wet

Tomato_Early_blight.label: Early blight
Tomato_Early_blight.description: Dark irregular spots with concentric rings that usually begin on lower leaves and spread upward.
actions: Mulch around plants to reduce soil splash
Water at the base of the plant

Tomato_Late_blight.label: Late blight
Tomato_Late_blight.description: Rapidly spreading dark lesions on leaves and fruit, often with pale green borders and white mold in humid conditions.
actions: Monitor plants frequently during cool wet weather
Do not compost infected plant material

Tomato_Leaf_Mold.label: Leaf mold
Tomato_Leaf_Mold.description: Yellow spots on upper leaf surfaces with olive-green or gray mold growth underneath leaves.
actions: Use resistant tomato varieties when available

Tomato_Septoria_leaf_spot.label: Septoria leaf spot
Tomato_Septoria_leaf_spot.description: Small circular spots with gray or tan centers and dark borders appearing mainly on lower leaves.

Tomato_Spider_mites_Two_spotted_spider_m.label: Two-spotted spider mite
Tomato_Spider_mites_Two_spotted_spider_m.description: Tiny mites causing yellow speckling, bronzing, and fine webbing on leaves.
actions: Spray undersides of leaves with water
Use insecticidal soap or miticide if infestations worsen

Tomato__Target_Spot.label: Target spot
Tomato__Target_Spot.description: Brown circular lesions with concentric ring patterns that can enlarge and damage foliage.

Tomato__Tomato_YellowLeaf__Curl_Virus.label: Tomato yellow leaf curl virus
Tomato__Tomato_YellowLeaf__Curl_Virus.description: Leaves curl upward and yellow while plants become stunted and bushy.
actions: Install insect barriers or reflective mulch

Tomato__Tomato_mosaic_virus.label: Tomato mosaic virus
Tomato__Tomato_mosaic_virus.description: Mottled mosaic-like light and dark green patterns on leaves with distorted or stunted growth.
actions: Do not handle plants when wet
Plant resistant tomato varieties if available

Tomato_healthy.label: Healthy
Tomato_healthy.description: No visible disease symptoms detected. Plant foliage appears healthy and vigorous.
actions: Monitor plants routinely for early symptoms
Use mulch to reduce soil-borne disease spread
